title: Launch Alpha Readiness Assessment — 2026-04-25
author: alice.chen
content:
LAUNCH ALPHA READINESS ASSESSMENT
Author: Alice Chen | Date: 2026-04-25 09:15 UTC
Deadline: Monday 2026-04-28 09:00 PT

OVERALL STATUS: NOT GO

Team readiness:

Engineering: BLOCKED
- NOVA-142 (critical): Launch page checkout integration not updated for v2 API
- NOVA-143 (critical): QA smoke test blocked pending NOVA-142 fix
- NOVA-139 (done): Gemini summarization complete
- Fix ETA: Monday 07:00 PT if Derek starts tonight

Design: READY
- All assets delivered (NOVA-140 done)
- No open design work

GTM: BLOCKED (soft)
- Launch email draft complete
- Legal pricing sign-off outstanding (NOVA-141 in review)
- Fallback send time available if delayed

Product: WAITING
- Go/no-go decision required by Sunday 18:00 PT
- Two critical blockers must resolve before decision

Critical path: NOVA-142 → NOVA-143 → QA sign-off → go/no-go → launch
